title: Playing at Love
writer: Curt Alexander, Max Ophüls, Felix Salten
actors: Wolfgang Liebeneiner, Carl Esmond, Magda Schneider
plot: Vienna in the beginning of the twentieth century. Cavalry Lieutenant Fritz Lobheimer is about to end his affair with Baroness Eggerdorff when he meets the young Christine, the daughter of an opera violinist. Baron Eggerdorff howev...
